options.name: description0
options.text: Pop Bubbles and collect all the orbs to win the level

options.name: description2
options.text: Use the walls to reach higher bubbles!

options.name: description3
options.text: Swap Bubbles by tapping the next Bubble!

options.name: description4
options.text: Hit the Dragon skull with a couple of Bubbles to smash it!

options.name: description5
options.text: Hit the Shield 4 times to discover the color!

options.name: description6
options.text: Hit the Dragon scales 3 times to discover the color!

options.name: description7
options.text: Metal balls are unbreakable, pop Bubbles to drop them
